initial_candidates.sql:
WITH monthly_net AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m-01', txn_date) AS month_start,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS net_amount
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m-01', txn_date)
),
cumulative_balance AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month_start,
        net_amount,
        SUM(net_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start) AS closing_balance,
        LAG(SUM(net_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start)) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start) AS prev_closing_balance
    FROM monthly_net
),
latest_month AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        MAX(month_start) AS latest_month_start
    FROM monthly_net
    GROUP BY customer_id
),
growth_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        cb.customer_id,
        cb.month_start,
        cb.closing_balance,
        cb.prev_closing_balance,
        CASE 
            WHEN cb.prev_closing_balance = 0 THEN cb.closing_balance * 100.0
            ELSE (cb.closing_balance - cb.prev_closing_balance) * 100.0 / cb.prev_closing_balance
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM cumulative_balance cb
    INNER JOIN latest_month lm 
        ON cb.customer_id = lm.customer_id 
        AND cb.month_start = lm.latest_month_start
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN growth_rate > 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_high_growth
FROM growth_rates;

WITH monthly_net AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m-01', txn_date) AS month_start,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS net_amount
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m-01', txn_date)
),
monthly_closing AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month_start,
        net_amount,
        SUM(net_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS closing_balance
    FROM monthly_net
),
monthly_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month_start,
        closing_balance,
        LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start) AS prev_closing_balance,
        CASE 
            WHEN LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start) = 0 THEN closing_balance * 100.0
            ELSE (closing_balance - LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start)) * 100.0 / LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start)
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM monthly_closing
),
latest_month_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        growth_rate
    FROM monthly_growth m1
    WHERE month_start = (SELECT MAX(month_start) FROM monthly_growth m2 WHERE m2.customer_id = m1.customer_id)
)
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN growth_rate > 5 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_high_growth_customers
FROM latest_month_growth;

WITH monthly_transactions AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m-01', txn_date) AS month_start,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE 0 END) -
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'withdrawal' THEN txn_amount ELSE 0 END) AS net_amount
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m-01', txn_date)
),
monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month_start,
        net_amount,
        SUM(net_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS closing_balance
    FROM monthly_transactions
),
monthly_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month_start,
        closing_balance,
        LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start) AS prev_closing_balance,
        CASE 
            WHEN LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start) = 0 THEN closing_balance * 100.0
            ELSE (closing_balance - LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start)) * 100.0 / LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start)
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM monthly_balances
),
latest_month_growth AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        growth_rate
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            customer_id,
            growth_rate,
            ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start DESC) AS rn
        FROM monthly_growth
    ) sub
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN growth_rate > 5 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS percentage_high_growth_customers
FROM latest_month_growth;

WITH monthly_nets AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        strftime('%Y-%m-01', txn_date) AS month_start,
        SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = 'deposit' THEN txn_amount ELSE -txn_amount END) AS net_amount
    FROM customer_transactions
    GROUP BY customer_id, strftime('%Y-%m-01', txn_date)
),
monthly_balances AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month_start,
        net_amount,
        SUM(net_amount) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start ROWS BETWEEN UNBOUNDED PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW) AS closing_balance
    FROM monthly_nets
),
recent_months AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month_start,
        closing_balance,
        LAG(closing_balance) OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start) AS prev_closing_balance,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY customer_id ORDER BY month_start DESC) AS rn
    FROM monthly_balances
),
growth_rates AS (
    SELECT 
        customer_id,
        month_start,
        closing_balance,
        prev_closing_balance,
        CASE 
            WHEN prev_closing_balance = 0 THEN closing_balance * 100.0
            ELSE (closing_balance - prev_closing_balance) * 100.0 / prev_closing_balance
        END AS growth_rate
    FROM recent_months
    WHERE rn = 1
)
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN growth_rate > 5 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS pct_customers_growth_over_5_percent
FROM growth_rates;

monthly_growth AS (
